macro_analyst:United_States:macro_indica.content: US macro indicators have rolled over decisively. Real GDP tracking 0.5% with ISM new orders sliding below 45. Recession risk has materially elevated; overweight US equity is no longer warranted. Recommended underweight US with defensive bias and quality tilt.

macro_analyst:Japan:tactical.content: Japan tactical picture has reversed sharply. Yen strength is biting into exporters; BoJ unexpectedly hiked, triggering carry-trade unwind. Underweight Japan equity recommended for the next quarter.

macro_analyst:China:macro_indicators.content: China macro picture has improved meaningfully. Property completions accelerating, retail sales surprising to the upside, policy package landing earlier than expected. Recommended overweight China equity for the next two quarters.

macro_analyst:United_States:sectors.content: Tech sector leadership re-asserting. Earnings beats across hyperscalers, AI capex accelerating, valuation digesting prior compression. Overweight Tech is the consensus tactical call for the next quarter.

commentary.headline: Regime shift: growth scare in US, recovery in China.
